title: cicerbita macrorhiza
intro: Cicerbita macrorhiza, also known as the woolly heads or broad-leaved cicero, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cicerbita macrorhiza include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a garnish for salads.
